message: Write a Break The Cubicle article titled: I Am Letting AI Agents Build My Next Startup - Here Is Day 1. The angle: I gave 4 AI agents (Scout, Builder, Tester, Marketer) their first assignments to build Polypal, a Chrome extension for splitting online purchases across multiple payment methods. Cover why I am doing this (limited time, two young kids, need income streams that build while I sleep), what each agent was assigned, and what I expect to see tomorrow. Tone: conversational, actionable, real - like talking to a friend who also wants to escape the 9-5. End with a CTA to follow the series on breakthecubicle.com.
